description: TEMPLATE example eval set. Every real skill must ship evals/evals.json with a happy path, an edge case, a should-not-do case, and objective assertions. Structurally validated only (no runner yet, decision D3). Replace all cases when you copy this template.

cases.prompt: A representative user request that SHOULD invoke this skill.

assertions: Produces the deliverable described in the skill's Output Format section.
Reads the items in Inputs to Inspect before acting.
Runs the Validation Checklist before declaring done.

cases.prompt: A less obvious but still in-scope request.

assertions: Handles the edge case named in the Gotchas section.

cases.prompt: An adjacent request that looks similar but is OUT of scope.

assertions: Does not invoke this skill; defers to the correct skill or a plain response.

cases.prompt: A request that hits a Stop Condition (ambiguous or destructive).

assertions: Halts and asks the human rather than proceeding.
